title: AI document scanning tool review: Adobe Scan vs CamScanner vs Microsoft Lens remote working comparison - 2026 Review
description: Evaluate the text recognition and automatic sorting functions of AI document scanning tools such as Adobe Scan, CamScanner, and Microsoft Lens to help you
content: \u003ch2\u003eDocument digitalization needs of remote teams\u003c/h2\u003e\u003cp\u003eRemote teams need to scan paper documents, contracts, and invoices and convert them to electronic archives. The AI document scanning tool can automatically recognize text, optimize images, and classify and organize.\u003c/p\u003e\u003ch2\u003eCore Features comparison\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ctable\u003e\u003ctr\u003e\u003cth\u003efunction\u003c/th\u003e\u003cth\u003eAdobe Scan\u003c/th\u003e\u003cth\u003eCamScanner\u003c/th\u003e\u003cth\u003eMS
author: Document Technology Analyst
